title: batatas subtriloba
intro: Batatas subtriloba is a type of plant, also known as the Three-lobed Yam or three-leafed yam, native to tropical Africa, and belongs to the Dioscoreaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its ability to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes. The health benefits of Batatas subtriloba include its potential to reduce blood sugar levels, lower cholesterol, and alleviate symptoms of fever and pain. The herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by boiling or drying the tubers and roots, which can be used to make teas, decoctions, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
